assertionResults.reason: At 1440x900, the desktop layout renders two columns with required dimensions: main max-width 1200px, content wrapper gap 80px, horizontal padding 40px, and right panel width 360px.
evidence: Computed styles observed: main.maxWidth=1200px; layout.gap=80px; layout.paddingLeft=40px; layout.paddingRight=40px; rightPanel.width=360px; leftPanel.width=680px.

assertionResults.reason: At 768x1024, layout stacks to one column and no horizontal overflow occurs, but horizontal padding is 20px per side instead of required 16px.
evidence: Computed styles observed: layout.flexDirection=column; layout.gap=0px; layout.paddingLeft=20px; layout.paddingRight=20px; leftPanel.width=728px; htmlScrollWidth=768 equals viewportWidth=768 (no overflow). Swap widget tabs render inline in content flow below stats at y=924.5.

assertionResults.reason: Navbar renders at exact required height and full viewport width with matching surface1 background.
evidence: Computed styles observed: header.height=72px; header.width=1440px at viewport 1440px; header.backgroundColor=rgb(19, 19, 19).

assertionResults.reason: Tab typography and active/inactive colors match (Trade 15px white, Explore 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.65)), and hover changes Explore to white, but hover transition is not smooth because computed transition-duration is 0s.
evidence: Computed styles observed: Trade.fontSize=15px, Trade.color=rgb(255,255,255); Explore.fontSize=15px, Explore.color=rgba(255,255,255,0.65) idle -> rgb(255,255,255) on hover; Explore.transitionProperty=all; Explore.transitionDuration=0s.

assertionResults.reason: Search bar styling matches expected surface2 background and neutral3 placeholder color with rounded shape.
evidence: Computed styles observed: searchContainer.width=280px; searchContainer.height=40px; searchContainer.backgroundColor=rgb(31, 31, 31); searchContainer.borderRadius=999999px; placeholderText('Search tokens').color=rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38).

frictions.description: Hovering by text locator 'Explore' initially failed because both 'Explore' and 'Explorer' matched in strict mode.
frictions.resolution: Used exact text matching ('find text "Explore" hover --exact').

summary: Validated 5 assigned assertions on localhost:3102. Passed: FOUNDATION-004, NAV-001, NAV-003. Failed: FOUNDATION-005 (20px mobile horizontal padding instead of required 16px) and NAV-002 (hover transition-duration is 0s). Console error checks returned none. Relevant network activity observed during validation includes GET / (3102), static assets, and API fetches to /depth, /market, /candles, and /trades on localhost:3100.
